page.title: Account Settings
page.description: Manage your account, children, and learning preferences.

profile.googleEmailNote: Google account — email cannot be changed here. Manage your email through your Google account.

children.addChildNote: Each child gets a separate learning path and progress dashboard.

items.label: Email when a child completes a topic
items.sublabel: Sent after each topic is finished

items.label: Alert when a child hasn't practised for 3+ days
items.sublabel: A gentle nudge to keep momentum

items.label: Weekly progress summary email
items.sublabel: Every Monday — overview of the past week

items.label: Milestone achievements
items.sublabel: When a child reaches 50% or 100% of their path

items.label: Trial expiry reminders 🔒
items.sublabel: Sent on day 5–6 of your free trial
items.disabledTitle: Trial reminders are always sent during your trial

password.googleSecuredText: Your account is secured by Google.
password.googleSecuredNote: Password management is handled through your Google account. Visit myaccount.google.com to update your security settings.

privacy.downloadDesc: Download a complete copy of your account data including your profile, children's profiles, test history, and learning progress. Exported as a JSON file.
privacy.downloadNotePrefix: Your download will be ready within a few minutes. We'll email you a link to
privacy.deleteDesc: Permanently delete your Kyros account and all associated data. Your account will be deactivated immediately and all data will be permanently deleted after 30 days.
deleteWarnings: Your active subscription will be cancelled
All children's profiles and progress will be archived
Downloaded data will remain with you
This action cannot be reversed after 30 days

archiveModal.descriptionSuffix: 's profile will be archived for 30 days. During this time, you can restore it from this page. After 30 days, all data is permanently deleted including: learning progress · scores and reports · diagnostic results · target schools
archiveModal.checkboxSuffix: 's profile will be archived and permanently deleted after 30 days

deleteModal.title: Delete your Kyros account?
deleteModal.description: This will immediately deactivate your account. All data will be permanently deleted after 30 days. Your subscription will be cancelled with no refund for the remaining billing period.
